subcodes.first_line: O My people! Hearken unto My call, for the Wronged One hath turned towards you, desiring naught but to draw you nigh unto the Ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شعبی اسمعوا ندائی ان المظلوم اقبل الیکم و ما اراد الا تقربکم الی البحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
